name: Md. Aminul Islam
title: Senior Lecturer
bio_raw:
Mohammad Aminul Islam has more than 10 years’ experience in teaching, writing and research at Bangladesh’s prestigious universities like University of Liberal Arts Bangladesh, Varendra University. He has also about five years of experience in journalism at reputed media organizations such as The Daily Star, Dhaka Tribune, daily sun and Independent Television Ltd.
Currently, he is a senior lecturer at the Department of Media Studies and Journalism at University of Liberal Art Bangladesh.
stated_interests: Communication in Healthcare, Public Health, Social Neuroscience, Medical Humanities, Biocommunicability, Bioethics, Health Psychology

education.raw: MPH in Health Promotion and Health Education, Bangladesh University of Health Science (On going)
MSS in Mass Communication and Journalism, University of Rajshahi
BSS in Mass in Mass Communication, University of Rajshahi
Post Graduate Diploma in Journalism (New Media), Asian College of Journalism, Chennai, India
Post Graduate Certificate Course in Computational Statistics at the Department of Statistics,Rajshahi University.
Post Graduate Certificate Course in Diversity and Inclusion Studiesat the Department of English and Humanities at BRAC University.
